Cancer of breast, Rt
過去病史無
家族史mother
病理2026-02-12： Breast, right, core needle biopsy --- invasive carcinoma with prominent mucinous differentiation
ER >90% , PR 2%, HER-2 0,KI-67 20%
檢查PET-CT
2026/03/06
1. Compatible with a "low" metabolic active malignancy for the two nodular lesions at lower-inner quadrant of right breast.
2. No definitely hypermetabolic lesion of suggesting regional LN or distant metastasis is noted in axilla, lung, liver, bone or elsewhere.
TNM staging for breast cancer (AJCC 8th edition): cT1c(m)N0M0
治療right partial mastectdomy with oncoplastic flap(2026-03-30)
Mucinous carcinoma, Gr1, score:5, T:single focus, 32x21x20 mm, DCIS(-), lv(-), pn(-), *margin:Involved, focal & peripheral, SN:0/5, Pathologic staging (pTNM, AJCC 8th): pT2N0 .

5212306 黃0棋 F/37 VS 李岳聰醫師乳癌
Cancer of breast, Rt
過去病史HTN(+) 高血脂
家族史無
病理2026-03-12： Breast, right, core needle biopsy --- infiltrating ductal carcinoma
ER 90% , PR 95%, HER-2 2+, FISH(-), KI-67 25%
檢查PET-CT
2026/03/25
1. The multiple FDG uptakes in UIQ of Rt. breast with a prominent one with CT sized 2.6 cm is suggestive of Rt. breast malignancy. (Se/Im= 13/124);
2. The several tiny nodules over bil. axillary level I areas, showing no apparent FDG uptake are suggestive of reactive nodes. (Se/Im= 13/113, 114);
3. No definitely hypermetabolic lesion of suggesting distant metastasis is noted in lung, liver, bil. adrenal glands, bone or elsewhere.
The FDG PET staging: T2N0M0, IIA (AJCC, 8th edn.)
治療Breast, right, modified radical mastectomy(2026-03-30)
IDC, Gr2, score:6, T:Single focus, 35x25x16 mm. EIC(-), microCal(+),lv(+), margin:free,LN: 1/3(SN:1/1), pT2N1a.
討論醫療小組結論:cT2N0M0 stage:IIA, pT2N1aM0 stage:IIB, 醫療小組後續追蹤:adjuvant chemotherapy EC(80mg, 700mg) on 2026-04-27

1072448 林0汝 F/56 VS 林建華醫師乳癌
Cancer of breast, Rt
過去病史Nil
家族史阿姨
病理2026-03-06： Breast, right, biopsy --- invasive ductal carcinoma
ER 0% , PR 0%, HER-2 3+,KI-67 30%
檢查PET-CT
2026/03/11
1. A breast malignancy is suggested for the high FDG avid mass in UOQ of Rt. breast with skin invlvement (Se/Im= 13/107);
2. The focal uptakes in Rt. axillary, level I-II areas (matted) are suggestive of ipsilateral malignant LAPs. (Se/Im= 13/107);
3. The tiny nodule in RML, lung, showing no apparent FDG uptakje is suggestive of an inactive granuloma. DDx: neoplasm. (Se/Im= 13/102);
4. The fibroinfiltrative change over bil. lower lungs with bil. lung base pleural thickness with mild FDG uptake are suggestive of inflammatory change. (Se/Im= 13/119);
The FDG PET staging: at least T4bN2aM0, IIIB (AJCC, 8th edn.)
治療MRM + right axillary lymph nodes dissection(2026-03-16)
IDC, Gr3, score:8, T:Single focus, 70x68x52 mm. EIC(+), microCal( -),lv(+), margin:free,LN: 6/15, pT4bN2a.
討論醫療小組結論:cT4bN2aM0 stage:IIIB, pT4bN2aM0 stage:IIIB , 醫療小組後續追蹤: adjuvant chemotherapy (LC+T) on 2026-03-23
